zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewell是John de Bardwell的兒子，於1412年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 文哈姆。他於1437年與Elizabeth Hethe在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆享年97歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewell was born in 1412, in Little Wenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of John de Bardwell. He married Elizabeth Hethe in 1437, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1509, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewellは1412年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ウエンハムでJohn de Bardwellの息子として生まれた。1437年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでElizabeth Hetheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewell(은)는 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 웬함에서 John de Bardwell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Elizabeth Hethe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewell родился в 1412 г. в местности литл венам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John de Bardwell. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hethe в 1437 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1509 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir William Berdewell nació en 1412, en Little Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John de Bardwell. Se casó con Elizabeth Hethe en 1437, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1509, en Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años.
